content: 如題，buff會在其他友方裝上命輪後清除

to unlock Ramona, one of the starting awakeners and your biggest companion in the game, to +12, you need to be Keeper lv 80, that is an incredibly high requirement, especially for a f2p.
I have 402 active days, more than a year, always playing some, and i'm only lv 70.
Now that we can take 3 copy per month of most welfare units, being able to get one to that level in only 4 moths, and considering that they now have the +12 special buff, I implore to lower the requirement to get her to +12 too.
力量錯誤的將褻瀆聖心顯示成6罪印實際效果5

This has probably been asked for to death, but it'd be nice if we could filter/search for specific Awakener/covenants supports in-game without having to rely on other players' UID referrals on Discord? If I just keep refreshing, I'll eventually run into the rare Nymphaea whale with +12 and a perfect set of covenants to add as a friend for a rainy day, but before that happens, I'll run into hundreds of Tawil +12 with Dreams of Medicine identical to 50 other people already on my friends list. It'd just be good QoL
If you have friends/follows that haven't logged in for 1+ months, their Madness Omen and Soulforge Aptitude preview will display incorrectly as 0/0

In the past it was asked if it was possible to make a separate testing server to try changes before they can go live, a feature that would be very useful to make more calibrate adjustments for units, covenants, posse etc, to lower the risk of releasing over or underpower modifications and then be stuck with those for a long time. 
But it was said that the team didn't have the manpower to manage a full separate server for it.

What if we make it a separate section in the base game? 
Where you don't have particular incentives to routinely participate (clearly labeled as such) and it's just a series of arc2 stages, some single bosses, some longer ones, literally copy and paste a series of old dtides stages and make them selectable at will.

With the possibility for people to test the changes to units and mechanics before they are out.
Unlocking the interested stuff only in that section.
Call it Doll Mind Palace or something (to indicate that is just a theoretical test area).
The names and profiles are not properly displayed, even after closing and opening the game

Hello, everyone. Today I want to present some ideas for improving the variety and versatility of the old covenants, especially in relation to their current impact within the game. The goal of these suggestions is to make them feel more useful, interesting, and competitive compared to newer and future systems.
When playing some awakeners exalt the characters / HP bar / Tentacles disappear from the screen. I'm playing on stream. It's hard to continue the fight with this bug so I hope devs fix it soon.

Brace for some banter, I wanted to talk about the characters the use their realms in a unique way, and the new divine realm mechanic <:Corpo_advance:1459080545882341376> (<= with Corpo appreciation even if she's not in this discussion)

# Characters that use their realms in a unique way
I **love** when a character uses their relm in a unique way, but it's sadly (besides aequor divine) mostly an old character thing, as per the candidates:
-# please do tell if I forgor anyone!

### Chaos
* Change how it plays for everyone
    * GRamona: Changes the next posse utilisation (*Minor*) 
* Change for themselves
    * Tawil: The huge keyflare gen is now a ressource to play cards
    * GRamona: Posse usage now is a damage scaling
    * 24 (pure Chaos): Posse usage now is a damage scaling

### Aequor
* Change how it plays for everyone
    * Gmurphy: Divine Aequor
    * Vortice: Divine Aequor
* Change for themselves
    * Vortice: Can 'devour' tentacles for damage scaling

### Caro
* Change how it plays for everyone
     * Thais: Scions double the devour realm mechanic
* Change for themselves
    * Salvador: Uses the furnace as a potential damage scaling source
    * Sorel: devour as many embryos as possible as a damage scaling

### Ultra
* Change how it plays for everyone
     * Cassiah: The untra bar is now really a place to store useful skills to get back
* Change for themselves:
    * Daffodil: quicker ultra turn access
    * Liz: Cards upgardes in ultra bar
    * Erica: I think she does smth with ultra bar and 0cost? but can't remember lmao

Hello, I need help, I've been playing the game for awhile, it's only been a few weeks. I don't know if I did something wrong, but for some reason, I can't play now. It keeps getting me stuck in the same screen everytime I open it.  I tried everything I know, I clicked the fix button and confirmed it multiple times, but it always put me back to the same screen. I have also tried redownloading it, but it doesn't work as well. What to do? I don't want to quit the game because I find it too good to quit..
